features.featureTitle: Change the main app background color to blue. Update the CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css to set the background (--background) to a solid blue color (e.g., a mid-range blue like #1E40AF or similar). Ensure this applies to the overall page/app shell.

Ensure all text throughout the application is clearly visible against the blue background. Audit and update text color CSS custom properties (--foreground, --muted-foreground, --card-foreground, etc.) in frontend/src/index.css and any inline styles in components (App.tsx, WelcomeScreen.tsx, ResumeForm.tsx, ResumePreview.tsx, and all section components) to use high-contrast colors (white or very light shades) so no text is invisible or hard to read on the blue background.
